prompt: A chase list: clients with outstanding documents ranked worst-first, and let me send one of them a reminder message without leaving the page.
wire:
<App name="Chase List">
  <Query id="deadlines" tool="host_listDeadlines" input={{}}/>
  <Query id="dashboard" tool="host_getDashboard" input={{}}/>
  <Stack gap={4}>
    <Row gap={3}>
      <CadenceMissingDocsHero missingCount={dashboard.clientsMissingDocuments} clientCount={dashboard.totalClients} badgeLabel="Outstanding documents"/>
      <Surface>
        <Stack gap={2}>
          <Text variant="caption">
            Documents received
          </Text>
          <Stat label="Received" value={dashboard.documentsReceived} format="number"/>
        </Stack>
      </Surface>
      <Surface>
        <Stack gap={2}>
          <Text variant="caption">
            Documents outstanding
          </Text>
          <Stat label="Outstanding" value={dashboard.documentsOutstanding} format="number" tone="danger"/>
        </Stack>
      </Surface>
      <Surface>
        <Stack gap={2}>
          <Text variant="caption">
            Nearest deadline
          </Text>
          <Stat label="Client" value={dashboard.nearestDeadline.clientName}/>
        </Stack>
      </Surface>
    </Row>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={3}>
        <Text variant="heading">
          Chase list — clients with outstanding documents
        </Text>
        <Text variant="caption">
          Ranked by documents missing, worst first. Send a reminder directly from this page.
        </Text>
        <DataTable rows={deadlines.data} sortBy="missingCount desc" searchable paginate={20} emptyState="No documents outstanding — nothing to chase this week." columns={[{ key: "clientName", label: "Client" }, { key: "entityType", label: "Entity" }, { key: "assignedStaff", label: "Staff" }, { key: "filingDeadline", label: "Deadline", format: "date" }, { key: "missingCount", label: "Missing", align: "end" }, { key: "receivedCount", label: "Received", align: "end" }, { key: "totalCount", label: "Total", align: "end" }, { key: "status", label: "Status" }]}/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <ChaseMessagePanel clients={deadlines.data}/>
  </Stack>
  <Island name="ChaseMessagePanel">interface Client {
      id: string;
      clientName: string;
      entityType?: string;
      missingCount?: number;
      missingDocumentKinds?: string[];
      status?: string;
    }

    interface Props {
      clients: Client[];
    }

    export default function ChaseMessagePanel({ clients = [] }: Props) {
      const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState<string>("");
      const [message, setMessage] = useState<string>("");
      const [status, setStatus] = useState<"idle"|"sending"|"pending"|"sent"|"error">("idle");
      const [errorMsg, setErrorMsg] = useState<string>("");

      const chaseClients = (clients || []).filter(c => (c.missingCount ?? 0) > 0);

      const selected = chaseClients.find(c => c.id === selectedId) ?? null;

      function buildDefaultMessage(client: Client): string {
        const kinds = client.missingDocumentKinds && client.missingDocumentKinds.length > 0
          ? client.missingDocumentKinds.join(", ")
          : "several documents";
        return `Hi ${client.clientName},\n\nWe're still waiting on ${kinds} to complete your filing. Could you please upload these at your earliest convenience?\n\nThank you,\nThe Firm`;
      }

      function handleClientChange(val: string) {
        setSelectedId(val);
        setStatus("idle");
        setErrorMsg("");
        const c = chaseClients.find(cl => cl.id === val);
        if (c) setMessage(buildDefaultMessage(c));
        else setMessage("");
      }

      async function handleSend() {
        if (!selectedId || !message.trim()) return;
        setStatus("sending");
        setErrorMsg("");
        try {
          const result = await tools.host_sendClientMessage({
            id: selectedId,
            body: { body: message.trim(), author: "firm" }
          });
          if (result && result.status === "pending-approval") {
            setStatus("pending");
          } else {
            setStatus("sent");
            setMessage("");
          }
        } catch (e: any) {
          setStatus("error");
          setErrorMsg(e?.message ?? "Something went wrong. Please try again.");
        }
      }

      const canSend = selectedId && message.trim().length > 0 && status !== "sending" && status !== "pending";

      return (
        <Surface>
          <Stack gap={3}>
            <Text variant="heading">Send a reminder</Text>
            <Text variant="caption">Select a client from the chase list, review the message, and send.</Text>

            {chaseClients.length === 0 ? (
              <Callout tone="success" title="Nothing to chase">No clients have outstanding documents right now.</Callout>
            ) : (
              <>
                <Select
                  label="Client"
                  placeholder="Choose a client…"
                  options={chaseClients}
                  labelField="clientName"
                  valueField="id"
                  value={selectedId}
                  onChange={(val: string) => handleClientChange(val)}
                />

                {selected && (
                  <Row gap={3}>
                    <Badge label={`${selected.missingCount ?? 0} missing`} tone="danger"/>
                    {selected.entityType && <Badge label={selected.entityType} tone="neutral"/>}
                    {selected.missingDocumentKinds && selected.missingDocumentKinds.length > 0 && (
                      <Text variant="caption">Missing: {selected.missingDocumentKinds.join(", ")}</Text>
                    )}
                  </Row>
                )}

                <Textarea
                  label="Message"
                  value={message}
                  placeholder="Write a reminder message…"
                  rows={6}
                  onChange={(val: string) => { setMessage(val); setStatus("idle"); }}
                />

                {status === "sent" && (
                  <Callout tone="success" title="Reminder sent">Your message has been sent to the client portal.</Callout>
                )}
                {status === "pending" && (
                  <Callout tone="warning" title="Awaiting approval">The message is pending approval before it reaches the client.</Callout>
                )}
                {status === "error" && (
                  <Callout tone="danger" title="Send failed">{errorMsg}</Callout>
                )}

                <Row gap={2}>
                  <Button
                    label={status === "sending" ? "Sending…" : status === "pending" ? "Awaiting approval…" : "Send reminder"}
                    variant="primary"
                    disabled={!canSend}
                    onClick={() => handleSend()}
                  />
                  {selectedId && status !== "sending" && (
                    <Button
                      label="Reset"
                      variant="secondary"
                      onClick={() => { setSelectedId(""); setMessage(""); setStatus("idle"); setErrorMsg(""); }}
                    />
                  )}
                </Row>
              </>
            )}
          </Stack>
        </Surface>
      );
    }</Island>
</App>

props.text: Chase list — clients with outstanding documents
Ranked by documents missing, worst first. Send a reminder directly from this page.

props.emptyState: No documents outstanding — nothing to chase this week.
